task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `execute_initiate_payment` so verified wallets no longer create a test-phase intent; the executor now calls `AdminChatCog._gate_fresh_intent_atomic(...)` directly and leaves the unverified-wallet prompt path unchanged. Verified with `python -m py_compile src/features/admin_chat/tools.py tests/test_admin_payments.py` and `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_social_route_tools.py -x`.

Added the `initiate_batch_payment` tool schema, admin-only classification, dispatcher wiring, and executor with all-or-none validation plus a single `create_admin_payment_intents_batch(...)` insert before per-intent fan-out. Verified-wallet entries are inserted as `awaiting_admin_init` and fan out through `_gate_existing_intent`, while unverified entries remain `awaiting_wallet` and receive the wallet prompt; verified with `python -m py_compile src/features/admin_chat/tools.py tests/test_admin_payments.py` and `pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_social_route_tools.py -x`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `execute_initiate_payment` now routes verified wallets through `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic` with no test payment or precreated `awaiting_test` intent, while the unverified-wallet path still creates `awaiting_wallet`, sends the wallet prompt, and persists `prompt_message_id`.

Confirmed `initiate_batch_payment` performs one `create_admin_payment_intents_batch` call for the full batch, inserts verified recipients as `awaiting_admin_init` and unverified recipients as `awaiting_wallet`, and verified fan-out calls `_gate_existing_intent` rather than `_gate_fresh_intent_atomic`.
